title: The Sound Of Wunderlich
description: The boys from Der Wunderlich Revue are back again in an Alpine adventure, ram-packed with naughty nuns and yodelling yokels. Expect the usual mix of smut and singing, nudity and stupidity. And of course men cheerleading. Plus mime, unicycling and magic. Possibly some circus skills. Maybe some silly games. With the incomparable compering talents of Mr Desmond O'Connor on the 21st and Mr Meredith on the 10th. Brighton's, and probably the UK's, longest running all-male cabaret. You'll laugh till you wet yourself. "A batshit bonkers baffling bonanza of men at their sublime silliest." Five stars, says To Do List. Who could disagree? The most Fringe show in the Fringe. Book your seat quickly as these shows will sell out.
content_warnings: This show may contain naked men being very silly

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
